summary: Tested PaymentPage integration for B2B Travel Platform. All features working correctly: PaymentPage route renders when currentView === 'payment', 4 payment methods (Credit Card, Bank EMI, My Wallet, Tabby) display correctly, Bank EMI shows bank dropdown and tenure options (3/6/9/12 months), Credit Card form has all required fields, Tabby shows 4 installment breakdown, Wallet shows balance info, Back button navigates to booking-confirmation, Order ID is generated and copyable, Amount reflects proposal total price. Backend /api/bookings endpoint working.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test proposal EF0A82F (Trip to Tbilisi)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PaymentPage fully tested. Navigation flow: Login > My Leads > My Proposals > View Proposal > BOOK NOW > I Understand, Continue to Book > Fill traveler details > Check consent > I Understand — Continue to Book > Proceed to Payment > PaymentPage. Payment processing is MOCKED (shows alert on Pay Now click).

features_tested.PaymentPage_route_in_App.js: PASSED - Lines 19-20 import, Line 296-302 render when currentView === 'payment'
features_tested.BookingConfirmation_Proceed_to_Payment: PASSED - onConfirmBooking callback navigates to PaymentPage

Bank_EMI_section.bank_select_dropdown: PASSED - 6 banks available (Emirates NBD, ADCB, Mashreq, FAB, DIB, RAKBANK)

features_tested.Tabby_section: PASSED - Shows 4 installments (AED 109 each for AED 437 total)
features_tested.Wallet_section: PASSED - Shows balance AED 0.00 with insufficient balance message
features_tested.Pay_Now_button: PASSED - Present and clickable (MOCKED - shows alert)

mocked_apis_note: Payment processing is MOCKED - Pay Now button shows alert. Google Sheets sync, PayPal checkout are also MOCKED as per original spec.
